title: Material Trades by Trader Type
query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS TotalTrades FROM MaterialTrade WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate
detailQuery: SELECT TraderType AS label, COUNT(*) AS value FROM MaterialTrade WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate GROUP BY TraderType ORDER BY value DESC

details.text: Number of material trades at each trader type during the report period.
details.help: TraderType indicates the type of material trader (Raw, Manufactured, Encoded).

tagLines: Material traders exist for inventory flexibility.
